member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.CrossInAppBilling.IsSupported
member.summary: Gets if the plugin is supported on the current platform.

member.name: T:Plugin.InAppBilling.BaseInAppBilling
member.summary: Base implementation for In App Billing, handling disposables

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.BaseInAppBilling.Storefront
member.summary: Gets a representation of the storefront

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.BaseInAppBilling.CanMakePayments
member.summary: Gets if the user can make payments

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.BaseInAppBilling.IgnoreInvalidProducts
member.summary: If you want to ignore invalid products when getting details

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.BaseInAppBilling.InTestingMode
member.summary: Gets or sets if in testing mode

member.name: M:Plugin.InAppBilling.BaseInAppBilling.GetProductInfoAsync(Plugin.InAppBilling.ItemType,System.String[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get product information of a specific product
member.param: Sku or Id of the product(s)

member.name: M:Plugin.InAppBilling.BaseInAppBilling.GetPurchasesAsync(Plugin.InAppBilling.ItemType,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get all current purchases for a specific product type. If verification fails for some purchase, it's not contained in the result.

member.name: M:Plugin.InAppBilling.BaseInAppBilling.PurchaseAsync(System.String,Plugin.InAppBilling.ItemType,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Purchase a specific product or subscription
member.param: Specifies an optional obfuscated string that is uniquely associated with the user's account in your app.
Specifies an optional obfuscated string that is uniquely associated with the user's profile in your app.
member.exception: If an error occurs during processing

member.name: M:Plugin.InAppBilling.BaseInAppBilling.UpgradePurchasedSubscriptionAsync(System.String,System.String,Plugin.InAppBilling.SubscriptionProrationMode,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: (Android specific) Upgrade/Downgrade a previously purchased subscription
member.param: Sku or ID of product that will replace the old one
Purchase token of original subscription (can not be null)

member.name: M:Plugin.InAppBilling.BaseInAppBilling.ConsumePurchaseAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Consume a purchase with a purchase token.
member.exception: If an error occurs during processing

member.name: M:Plugin.InAppBilling.BaseInAppBilling.Dispose
member.summary: Dispose of class and parent classes

member.name: M:Plugin.InAppBilling.BaseInAppBilling.PresentCodeRedemption
member.summary: iOS: Displays a sheet that enables users to redeem subscription offer codes that you configure in App Store Connect.

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.IInAppBilling.IsConnected
member.summary: Determines if it is connected to the backend actively (Android).

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.IInAppBilling.InTestingMode
member.summary: Gets or sets if in testing mode

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.IInAppBilling.IgnoreInvalidProducts
member.summary: If you want to ignore invalid products when getting details

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.IInAppBilling.Storefront
member.summary: Represenation of the storefront if available

member.name: M:Plugin.InAppBilling.IInAppBilling.GetProductInfoAsync(Plugin.InAppBilling.ItemType,System.String[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get product information of a specific product
member.param: Sku or Id of the product(s)

member.name: M:Plugin.InAppBilling.IInAppBilling.GetPurchasesAsync(Plugin.InAppBilling.ItemType,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get all current purchases for a specific product type. If you use verification and it fails for some purchase, it's not contained in the result.

member.name: M:Plugin.InAppBilling.IInAppBilling.PurchaseAsync(System.String,Plugin.InAppBilling.ItemType,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Purchase a specific product or subscription
member.param: Android: Specifies an optional obfuscated string that is uniquely associated with the user's account in your app.
Android: Specifies an optional obfuscated string that is uniquely associated with the user's profile in your app.
member.exception: If an error occurs during processing

member.name: M:Plugin.InAppBilling.IInAppBilling.UpgradePurchasedSubscriptionAsync(System.String,System.String,Plugin.InAppBilling.SubscriptionProrationMode,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: (Android specific) Upgrade/Downgrade a previously purchased subscription
member.param: Sku or ID of product that will replace the old one
Purchase token of original subscription (can not be null)
Proration mode (1 - ImmediateWithTimeProration, 2 - ImmediateAndChargeProratedPrice, 3 - ImmediateWithoutProration, 4 - Deferred)
member.exception: If an error occurs during processing

member.name: M:Plugin.InAppBilling.IInAppBilling.ConsumePurchaseAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Consume a purchase with a purchase token.
member.exception: If an error occurs during processing

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.IInAppBilling.CanMakePayments
member.summary: Gets if user is allowed to make a payment.

member.name: M:Plugin.InAppBilling.IInAppBilling.PresentCodeRedemption
member.summary: iOS: Displays a sheet that enables users to redeem subscription offer codes that you configure in App Store Connect.

member.name: F:Plugin.InAppBilling.PurchaseError.BillingUnavailable
member.summary: Billing API version is not supported for the type requested (Android), client error (iOS)

member.name: F:Plugin.InAppBilling.PurchaseError.PaymentNotAllowed
member.summary: User is not allowed to authorize payments

member.name: F:Plugin.InAppBilling.PurchaseError.PaymentInvalid
member.summary: One of the payment parameters was not recognized by app store

member.name: F:Plugin.InAppBilling.PurchaseError.NotOwned
member.summary: Item is not owned and can not be consumed

member.name: T:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingProductAppleExtras
member.summary: Product info specific to Apple Platforms

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingProductAppleExtras.SubscriptionGroupId
member.summary: The identifier of the subscription group to which the subscription belongs.

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingProductAppleExtras.SubscriptionPeriod
member.summary: The period details for products that are subscriptions.

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingProductAppleExtras.IsFamilyShareable
member.summary: A Boolean value that indicates whether the product is available for family sharing in App Store Connect.

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingProductAppleExtras.IntroductoryOffer
member.summary: iOS 11.2: gets information about product discount

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingProductAppleExtras.Discounts
member.summary: iOS 12.2: gets information about product discount

member.name: T:Plugin.InAppBilling.WindowsSubscriptionInfo
member.summary: Windows Store subscription information extracted from SKUs

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.WindowsSubscriptionInfo.Skus
member.summary: List of available SKUs for this subscription product

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.WindowsSubscriptionInfo.HasTrialOptions
member.summary: Indicates if any SKU has trial options available

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.WindowsSubscriptionInfo.DefaultSku
member.summary: The default/recommended SKU (usually the non-trial version)

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.WindowsSkuInfo.IsSubscription
member.summary: Indicates if this SKU is a subscription

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.WindowsSkuInfo.IsTrial
member.summary: Indicates if this SKU is a trial

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.WindowsSkuInfo.ExtendedJsonData
member.summary: Extended JSON data for this SKU

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.WindowsSkuInfo.SubscriptionInfo
member.summary: Subscription-specific information if this is a subscription SKU

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.WindowsSkuInfo.Availabilities
member.summary: Different pricing availabilities for this SKU

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.WindowsPriceInfo.IsOnSale
member.summary: Indicates if this price is on sale

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.WindowsPriceInfo.SaleEndDate
member.summary: When the sale ends (if on sale)

member.name: T:Plugin.InAppBilling.WindowsStoreSubscriptionInfo
member.summary: Windows Store subscription details from StoreSku.SubscriptionInfo

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.WindowsStoreSubscriptionInfo.BillingPeriod
member.summary: Number of billing periods (e.g., 1 for monthly, 12 for yearly)

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.WindowsStoreSubscriptionInfo.HasTrialPeriod
member.summary: Whether this subscription has a trial period

member.name: T:Plugin.InAppBilling.WindowsAvailabilityInfo
member.summary: Windows Store availability information (different pricing options)

member.name: T:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingProductWindowsExtras
member.summary: Product info specific to Windows platform

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingProductWindowsExtras.FormattedBasePrice
member.summary: Gets the base price for the add-on (also called an in-app product or IAP) with the appropriate formatting for the current market.

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingProductWindowsExtras.FormattedRecurrencePrice
member.summary: Gets the recurring price for subscription products

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingProductWindowsExtras.ExtendedJsonData
member.summary: Complete product data in JSON format

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingProductWindowsExtras.HasDigitalDownload
member.summary: Whether the product has downloadable content

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingProductWindowsExtras.InAppOfferToken
member.summary: In-app offer token for this product

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingProductWindowsExtras.IsInUserCollection
member.summary: Whether the user already owns this product

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingProductWindowsExtras.IsOnSale
member.summary: Gets a value that indicates whether the add-on (also called an in-app product or IAP) is on sale.

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingProductWindowsExtras.SaleEndDate
member.summary: Gets the end date of the sale period for the add-on (also called an in-app product or IAP).

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingProductWindowsExtras.Tag
member.summary: Gets the custom developer data string (also called a tag) that contains custom information about an add-on (also called an in-app product or IAP). This string corresponds to the value of the Custom developer data field in the properties page for the add-on in Partner Center.

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingProductWindowsExtras.IsSubscription
member.summary: Whether this product is a subscription

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingProductWindowsExtras.SubscriptionInfo
member.summary: Detailed subscription information including SKUs and pricing options

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingProductWindowsExtras.Keywords
member.summary: Gets the list of keywords associated with the add-on (also called an in-app product or IAP). These strings correspond to the value of the Keywords field in the properties page for the add-on in Partner Center.

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingProductAndroidExtras.SubscriptionOfferDetails
member.summary: The period details for products that are subscriptions.

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingProduct.CurrencyCode
member.summary: ISO 4217 currency code for price. For example, if price is specified in British pounds sterling is "GBP".

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingProduct.MicrosPrice
member.summary: Price in micro-units, where 1,000,000 micro-units equal one unit of the currency. For example, if price is "€7.99", price_amount_micros is "7990000". This value represents the localized, rounded price for a particular currency.

member.name: T:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingProductDiscount
member.summary: The details of an introductory offer or a promotional offer for an auto-renewable subscription.

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingProductDiscount.Id
member.summary: A string used to uniquely identify a discount offer for a product.

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingProductDiscount.Price
member.summary: The discount price of the product in the local currency.

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingProductDiscount.LocalizedPrice
member.summary: The locale used to format the discount price of the product.

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingProductDiscount.PaymentMode
member.summary: The payment mode for this product discount.

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingProductDiscount.NumberOfPeriods
member.summary: An integer that indicates the number of periods the product discount is available.

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingProductDiscount.SubscriptionPeriod
member.summary: An object containing the subscription period duration information.

member.name: T:Plugin.InAppBilling.SubscriptionPeriod
member.summary: An object containing the subscription period duration information.

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.SubscriptionPeriod.NumberOfUnits
member.summary: The number of units per subscription period.

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.SubscriptionPeriod.Unit
member.summary: The increment of time that a subscription period is specified in. From day to up to a year

member.name: T:Plugin.InAppBilling.PaymentMode
member.summary: Gets the current status of the purchase

member.name: F:Plugin.InAppBilling.PaymentMode.FreeTrial
member.summary: A constant that indicates that the payment mode is a free trial.

member.name: F:Plugin.InAppBilling.PaymentMode.PayUpFront
member.summary: A constant indicating that the payment mode of a product discount is paid up front.

member.name: F:Plugin.InAppBilling.PaymentMode.PayAsYouGo
member.summary: Values representing the payment modes for a product discount.

member.name: T:Plugin.InAppBilling.SubscriptionPeriodUnit
member.summary: An object that defines the period for the product discount.

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingPurchase.TransactionIdentifier
member.summary: TransactionIdentifier - This is the Id/Token that needs to be acknowledge/finalized

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingPurchase.OriginalTransactionIdentifier
member.summary: OriginalTransactionIdentifier - This is the Id/Token of restored transaction from the AppStore

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingPurchase.AutoRenewing
member.summary: Indicates whether the subscription renewed automatically. If true, the sub is active, else false the user has canceled.

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingPurchase.PurchaseToken
member.summary: Unique token identifying the purchase for a given item

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.InAppBillingPurchase.IsAcknowledged
member.summary: Only valid on Android, tells us if our purchase is acknowledged or not and needs to be finalized

member.name: F:Plugin.InAppBilling.ItemType.InAppPurchaseConsumable
member.summary: Single purchase that needs to be consumed manually

member.name: F:Plugin.InAppBilling.SubscriptionProrationMode.KeepExisting
member.summary: Keep the original payment schedule. Added in Google Play Billing Library 8.1.

member.name: T:Plugin.InAppBilling.PurchaseState
member.summary: Gets the current status of the purchase

member.name: F:Plugin.InAppBilling.PurchaseState.Purchasing
member.summary: In the process of being processed

member.name: T:Plugin.InAppBilling.Storefront
member.summary: An object containing the location and unique identifier of an App Store storefront.

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.Storefront.Id
member.summary: A value defined by Apple that uniquely identifies an App Store storefront.

member.name: P:Plugin.InAppBilling.Storefront.CountryCode
member.summary: The three-letter code representing the country or region associated with the App Store storefront.
